action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py times out after ~23/100 objects in 257s (~11s/object). The batch approach failed with off-by-one errors. Analysis: The off-by-one in batch mode (720895 vs 720896) is the same issue as single-view (65535 vs 65536). The fix is to pad rays to exact count. Also, setting chunk_size to a very large value (larger than 11*256*256) avoids chunking entirely. With batched rendering of all 11 views at once, we should get ~5-8x speedup. Decision: Fix predict.py to batch all 11 views with padding, use large chunk_size to avoid chunking issues.
